scripts.cf:d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply malaysia-flight-deal-radar --local
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply malaysia-flight-deal-radar --remote
scripts.cf:demo:seed:local: npx wrangler d1 execute malaysia-flight-deal-radar --local --file scripts/sql/remote-demo-baseline-seed.sql
scripts.cf:demo:seed:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute malaysia-flight-deal-radar --remote --file scripts/sql/remote-demo-baseline-seed.sql
scripts.cf:demo:cleanup:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute malaysia-flight-deal-radar --remote --file scripts/sql/remote-demo-cleanup.sql
